title: RF elements TPA-PAF TwistPort adaptor for Rocket Prism 5AC, airFiber 5X, LTU-Rocket and Wave MLO5
category: Wireless / Antennas / TwistPort and other adapters
description: The TwistPort TPA-PAF adapter is designed for connection between Ubiquiti Rocket Prism 5AC , airFiber 5X / 5XHD and antenna with TwistPort connector. TwistPort adapters are equipped with a new fast-lock system from RF elements. Connecting and disconnecting a drive from / into the TwistPort adapter is very simple and does not require any tools. Integration into the TwistPort ecosystem ensures very low RF losses, scalability, easy deployment and easy maintenance The TwistPort connector is practically loss-free and, thanks to its easy handling, changes all established standards. There are no RF connectors or RF cables that cause significant signal loss. Compared to commonly used coaxial cables and connectors, the loss on TwistPort is almost unmeasurable . So we can say that TwistPort is practically lossless . Connection and disconnection is ingeniously simple and can be done with one hand TwistPort Adaptors make most popular connectorized radios and MikroTik RouterBoards compatible with TwistPort antennas. Integration into TwistPort eco-system ensures the benefits of low loss, high scalability, easy co-location, simple deployment and easy maintenance Ubiquiti Rocket Prism 5AC Ubiquiti Rocket Prism 5AC Gen2 Ubiquiti airFiber 5X Ubiquiti airFiber 5XHD Ubiquiti LTU Rocket Ubiquiti Wave MLO5
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,8 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors TwistPort, (1) RSMA female, (3) RSMA male Physical characteristics Place for indoor unit Yes Mounting On the antenna Purpose Outdoor Material Aluminum, UV stabilized ABS plastic Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Weight [g] 340 Width [mm] 124 Height [mm] 128 Depth [mm] 100 General Compatibility airFiber AF-5X
